title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · PBQ Checkpoint
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Read connected, static, dynamic, default, and host routes and select the longest matching destination prefix.
Configure and evaluate static and default routes with next-hop reachability, recursion, failover, and documentation.
Compare BGP, EIGRP, and OSPF scope, neighbor behavior, path information, convergence, and use cases at N10-009 depth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
